name: Eggplant w/ Chopped Pork
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Eggplant, approximately 1/2 lb each, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the wok.
2. Add oil and let it heat.
3. Add garlic and ginger; stir fry for about 30 seconds.
4. Add chilli paste; stir fry for about 30 seconds.
5. Add the pork mixture; stir fry for about 2 minutes, breaking up clumps of meat to ensure all is exposed to the oil.
6. Add eggplant; stir fry for about 4 minutes, gently scooping pieces off the sides of the wok and into the middle.
7. Sprinkle salt and sugar over the ingredients; stir fry for about 2 minutes.
8. Pour in water and add scallions.
9. When the water boils, cover and cook over high flame for about 10 minutes until the eggplant is soft and has absorbed the meat flavor.
10. Serve!
